history.text: Ancient Israelite kingdoms emerged in the southern Levant.
The Balfour Declaration backed a national home for the Jewish people in Palestine.
The State of Israel declared independence.
The Six-Day War changed Israel's borders and regional politics.
The Oslo Accords began a new phase of Israeli-Palestinian negotiations.

worthSeeing.title: Jerusalem:
worthSeeing.text: Holy city for Judaism, Christianity, and Islam, with the Western Wall, Church of the Holy Sepulchre, and Al-Aqsa.

worthSeeing.title: Tel Aviv:
worthSeeing.text: Vibrant Mediterranean city of beaches, Bauhaus architecture, and world-class cuisine.

worthSeeing.title: Dead Sea:
worthSeeing.text: The lowest point on earth, where salt-saturated water makes floating effortless.
